spells.name: Douse
spells.flavor: Snuff a fire to its embers; the dark floods back in.

spells.name: Glimmer
spells.flavor: A cold light blooms where you point, fixing the place in memory.

spells.name: Phantom Clamor
spells.flavor: A din erupts elsewhere; curious ears turn from you.

spells.name: Phantom Double
spells.flavor: A double of yourself steps from the air to draw the blade meant for you.

spells.name: Ember Lance
spells.flavor: A lance of fire, and most of your strength with it.
